svg.text: Conv_Simple / CV-101 (garage conveyor) — O-00..O-06 · pilots, Q1/MLC control-relay coil, button lamp · GS10 control = HYBRID Modbus + hardwired I/O (E-007; map OI-22)
output bank 1 feed (O-04..O-06, spare) · spare bank — unused
output bank 1 return · spare bank — unused
Hardwired fallback documented in MIRA-WI-001 v3 §3 Fig 1 (DO_03..DO_07 →
GS10 DI1..DI5 + DCM) — NOT ACTIVE and NOT drawn: P02.0x at factory default
per the 2026-05-20 parameter export; DO_07 does not exist on the
2080-LC20-20QBB (O-00..O-06); DO_03 collides with PBRunLED in the live I/O
map. Bench presence of any such wiring = FIELD VERIFY (OI-18).
• Monitored outputs are NOT a safety function.
• E-stop must remove power per NFPA 79.
• Q1/MLC is a CONTROL RELAY (24 VDC coil, driven by O-02) whose 2 NO contacts
(13-14, 43-44) switch the drive's 230 V 1φ supply (V6 correction, E-003) — de-
energizing O-02 DOES remove Q1's switched supply to the GS10. Q1 is NOT an
NFPA-79/EN-60204-1 safety-rated disconnect (small control-relay contacts, not a
lockable safety contactor); the e-stop (S0) → O-02 relationship is FIELD VERIFY
(OI-26). Do not treat this circuit as the LOTO isolation point — always LOTO at
• Q1/MLC = Schneider TeSys CA3KN22BD control relay (2 NO + 2 NC, 24 VDC coil);
coil A1(+)/A2(-) driven by O-02 (verified from photo wire_3). NO contacts
13-14/43-44 switch the VFD's 230 V 1φ supply (see E-003); 21-22/31-32 NC
• GS10 control (full-res photo): run/dir/speed = Modbus — top FWD/REV/DI
connector is EMPTY, RJ45 landed. Bottom analog/output row
(+10V/ACM/AI/AO1/DO1/DOC) is wired — likely speed reference + feedback. Map =
• NO contacts 13-14 & 43-44 switch the 230 V 1φ VFD supply (see E-003); coil
• GS10 run/dir/freq = Modbus — see E-007 (P00.20=1, P00.21=2 per 2026-05-20
• No as-built: O-00/O-01/O-03 from CCW v4.0; O-02 corroborated by live
• Output bank technology + common feed = FIELD VERIFY (OI-09): WI-001 p.4 says
relay dry contacts; ±CM polarity naming suggests DC-fed banks — conflicting
output map CCW v4.0 + live Prog_init; O-02 do-not-reuse
